title: Regional Product Manager – Consumer Printers
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Collaborate closely with regional sales companies to meet sales targets and overall business objectives.
  • Monitor sell-in, sell-out, and sell-through performance across regions to maintain healthy sales momentum and optimal inventory levels.
  • Track and analyze market activities, competitive landscape, and market share data to develop effective marketing strategies.
  • Conduct market research and translate consumer insights and technology trends into strategic business decisions.
  • Understand consumer needs and behaviour to identify suitable products and services for various market segments, influencing the long-term product roadmap.
  • Lead new product launches, including developing product and pricing strategies, coordinating product training, and implementing impactful go-to-market communication plans.
  • Plan and execute marketing initiatives with a strong focus on ROI and business impact.
  • Oversee the entire product lifecycle, from pre-launch preparation to end-of-life strategy.
  • Continuously refine pricing strategies based on market conditions, internal performance, and competitive dynamics.
  • Design and implement effective go-to-market strategies to help regional sales teams achieve their sales and growth targets.

Key Requirements

  • Analytical Thinking: Strong data-driven mindset with the ability to interpret market data and performance metrics.
  • Effective Communication: Skilled in delivering presentations and collaborating with regional teams.
  • Problem Solving: Capable of conducting research, assessing market situations, and proposing well-reasoned solutions.
  • Integrity & Confidentiality: Trusted with sensitive information including product details, pricing, and budgets.
  • Time Management: Highly organized, disciplined, and able to deliver results independently and on time.
  • Passion for Technology: A strong interest in IT and printing solutions will be a significant advantage.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

Wecruit Pte Ltd

EA License No. 20C0270

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
